title: chrysanthemum lingulatum
intro: Chrysanthemum lingulatum, also known as Garland chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant has medicinal properties that have been utilized in treating various health conditions, including fever, headaches, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum lingulatum include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. It is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried flower for herbal preparations, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
